apps.name: ColdCase
apps.subtitle: Online Detective Game
apps.description: An interactive detective game where players investigate unsolved cases, analyze clues, and connect evidence to uncover the truth. Designed as a mobile-first experience, ColdCase lets players step into the role of a digital detective and solve mysteries through immersive case files and investigation mechanics.
apps.longDescription: ColdCase is a mobile-first detective game where every case is a mystery waiting to be solved. Dive into detailed case files, examine evidence photos, cross-reference witness statements, and piece together the clues to name your suspect. Each case is crafted to challenge your deductive reasoning — can you close the case before the trail goes cold?
features: Analyze clues, evidence photos, and witness statements
Connect the dots and name your suspect
Mobile-first design with intuitive investigation mechanics

apps.name: yâdet
apps.subtitle: Remote Cemetery Care Platform
apps.description: A mobile-first cemetery care platform that enables remote grave maintenance. Users can publish care requests, while local service providers accept tasks and complete them on-site — making it possible to manage and monitor cemetery services from anywhere.
apps.longDescription: yâdet is a mobile-first platform designed for remote grave maintenance. Whether you live far from your loved ones’ burial site or simply cannot visit regularly, yâdet connects you with trusted local service providers who complete care tasks on-site. You can publish requests, receive photo updates, and monitor progress — all from your phone, anywhere in the world.
features: Local service providers accept and complete tasks on-site
Photo updates and task monitoring from anywhere

apps.name: Git Search AI
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Git Commit Search for VS Code
apps.description: AI-powered Git commit history and code search tool for VS Code. Running on your local machine, it helps you find the code you need in seconds.
apps.longDescription: Git Search AI is a VS Code extension that uses AI to search through your entire git commit history and codebase semantically. Simply describe what you are looking for in plain language and the extension surfaces the relevant commits and code changes instantly — all running privately on your local machine.
features: AI-powered semantic search across git history
Runs entirely on your local machine — no cloud, no tracking
Find code changes by describing them in natural language

apps.name: Personal Website
apps.subtitle: osmankoc.dev — Next.js & TypeScript
apps.description: osmankoc.dev — Personal portfolio and blog site. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
apps.longDescription: osmankoc.dev is Osman Koç’s personal website and blog, built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features a portfolio of projects, a blog powered by Medium RSS feed, talks and presentations, and a clean minimal design. The source code is open on GitHub.
features: Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
Blog powered by Medium RSS integration

apps.name: En Yakın Hastaneyi Bul
apps.subtitle: Nearest Hospital Finder — Telegram Bot
apps.description: A Telegram bot that finds and transmits the name, address, telephone and map location of the nearest hospitals around you by location. Works in Türkiye.
apps.longDescription: En Yakın Hastaneyi Bul is a Telegram bot that, given your location, instantly returns the name, address, phone number, and map link for the nearest hospitals in Türkiye. Just share your location in the chat and the bot takes care of the rest.
features: Share your location to find the nearest hospitals
Returns name, address, phone number, and map link

apps.name: En Yakın Eczaneyi Bul
apps.subtitle: Nearest Pharmacy Finder — Telegram Bot
apps.description: A Telegram bot that finds the nearest or on-duty pharmacies around you. Returns name, address, telephone and map location. Works in Türkiye.
apps.longDescription: En Yakın Eczaneyi Bul is a Telegram bot that locates the closest open or on-duty pharmacies in Türkiye based on your shared location. It responds with the pharmacy name, address, phone number, and a direct map link — perfect for late-night situations when you need to find a nöbetçi eczane quickly.
features: Find the nearest open or on-duty pharmacy by location
Returns name, address, phone number, and map link
Also finds nöbetçi eczane (late-night on-duty pharmacies)

apps.name: GuidGenerator
apps.subtitle: GUID Generator Extension for VS Code
apps.description: Generate and insert GUIDs (UUID) effortlessly into your code using a simple shortcut. A VS Code extension by kocdev.
apps.longDescription: GuidGenerator is a lightweight VS Code extension that generates and inserts RFC 4122-compliant GUIDs (UUIDs) directly into your code with a single keyboard shortcut. No more leaving your editor to copy a GUID from an online tool — just trigger the command and it is inserted at your cursor.
features: Generate RFC 4122-compliant GUIDs with a shortcut
Insert GUID directly at cursor position

apps.name: GuidGenerator for Visual Studio
apps.subtitle: GUID Generator Extension for Visual Studio
apps.description: Generate and insert GUIDs effortlessly into your code using a simple shortcut. A Visual Studio extension by kocdev.
apps.longDescription: GuidGenerator for Visual Studio is the classic IDE companion to the VS Code edition. It generates and inserts GUIDs directly into your code with a keyboard shortcut, keeping you in the flow without switching to an external tool. Available on the Visual Studio Marketplace.
features: Generate and insert GUIDs with a keyboard shortcut

apps.name: Whistle SOS
apps.subtitle: Emergency Whistle for Earthquake Situations
apps.description: Emergency whistle app for earthquake situations. Turn your phone into a loud whistle to signal for help when trapped. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Whistle SOS (Deprem Düdüğü) turns your smartphone into a powerful emergency whistle during earthquake situations. If you are trapped and need to signal your location to rescuers, simply open the app and activate the whistle — no internet or phone service required. Developed with Flutter for both Android and iOS.
features: Loud emergency whistle — no internet required

apps.name: Random Quotes
apps.subtitle: Daily Inspirational Quotes App
apps.description: Daily inspirational quotes app. Get motivated with a new quote every day. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Random Quotes is a clean, minimal Flutter app that delivers a fresh inspirational quote each day. Browse quotes by category, save favorites, and share them with friends. Designed for simplicity and a distraction-free reading experience.
features: A new inspirational quote every day

apps.name: Simple ToDo
apps.subtitle: Minimalist Todo List App
apps.description: Minimalist todo list app for daily tasks. Keep it simple, get it done. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Simple ToDo is a no-frills Flutter app focused entirely on getting your tasks done. Add tasks, check them off, and move on — with no subscriptions, no accounts, and no distractions. Your tasks stay on your device.
features: Tasks stored locally on your device

apps.name: Baby Sleeper
apps.subtitle: Soothing Sounds & Lullabies for Babies
apps.description: Soothing sounds and lullabies to help babies fall asleep. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Baby Sleeper is a Flutter app packed with carefully curated soothing sounds and lullabies to help infants and toddlers drift off peacefully. Choose from white noise, nature sounds, and classic lullabies. Set a sleep timer and let the app do the rest.
features: White noise, nature sounds, and classic lullabies
